misc.title: I can understand that many find it silly, but many of Luffy's fights were silly and funny, yet when it came to seriousness, it remained so, even with G5. The best example is the end of Kaido vs. Luffy
misc.text: I can understand that many find it silly, but many of Luffy's fights were silly and funny, yet when it came to seriousness, it remained so, even with G5. The best example is the end of Kaido vs. Luffy... This form has enormous potential, and Oda took a huge risk with it; you have to give him that.

misc.title: Gear 5 is a successful and special form for me because it's unique and has a lot of potential. Just look at 99% of shonen manga and their main characters. Has there ever been a similar leap from the m
misc.text: Gear 5 is a successful and special form for me because it's unique and has a lot of potential. Just look at 99% of shonen manga and their main characters. Has there ever been a similar leap from the mangaka for their MC? Luffy remains unique with Gear 5, his fightstyle is 🔥;) Video

items.title: I can understand that many find it silly, but many of Luffy's fights were silly and funny, yet when it came to seriousness, it remained so, even with G5. The best example is the end of Kaido vs. Luffy
items.text: I can understand that many find it silly, but many of Luffy's fights were silly and funny, yet when it came to seriousness, it remained so, even with G5. The best example is the end of Kaido vs. Luffy... This form has enormous potential, and Oda took a huge risk with it; you have to give him that.
